aronui.when_to_use: Use when the conversation context is large and intermediate results have been saved to working memory, to reset and start fresh while preserving the plan and memory.
aronui.output_shape: Resets the conversation context; the new context retains only the plan and working memory, with the provided summary inserted as a narrative record.

pitfalls.text: Non-string 'summary': '[ERROR] summary must be a string'.

procedure: Ensure all important intermediate results are saved to working memory.
Call checkpoint_context with a non-empty 'summary' string describing the completed steps.
The tool archives history and provides a fresh context with only plan, working memory, and the summary.
verification: Check that conversation history is cleared except for plan and working memory.
Confirm that the summary text appears in the new context as a narrative record of the accomplished work.
